title: taraxacum nudicola
intro: Taraxacum nudicola, also known as the naked dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum nudicola include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and act as a natural remedy for digestive problems. Taraxacum nudicola can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can be used in salads, with the roots being used to make a coffee substitute.
